obligation_text: MCPs must use the eligibility criteria provided to evaluate Members.
source_quote: MCPs must use the eligibility criteria provided to evaluate Members and may not impose additional eligibility requirements for authorization of ECM.

obligation_text: MCPs may not impose additional eligibility requirements for authorization of ECM.
source_quote: MCPs must use the eligibility criteria provided to evaluate Members and may not impose additional eligibility requirements for authorization of ECM.

obligation_text: When a Member under 21 is served in ECM and does not meet the adult ECM criteria upon turning 21, the Member should not be disenrolled from ECM due to aging out alone.
source_quote: When a Member under 21 is served in ECM and does not meet the adult ECM criteria upon turning 21, the Member should not be disenrolled from ECM due to aging out alone; rather, the ECM Provider and MCP should apply the MCP’s usual, DHCS-approved “graduation” criteria to determine when the Member is ready to disenroll.

obligation_text: When a Member under 21 is served in ECM and does not meet the adult ECM criteria upon turning 21, the ECM Provider and MCP should apply the MCP’s usual, DHCS-approved “graduation” criteria to determine when the Member is ready to disenroll.
source_quote: When a Member under 21 is served in ECM and does not meet the adult ECM criteria upon turning 21, the Member should not be disenrolled from ECM due to aging out alone; rather, the ECM Provider and MCP should apply the MCP’s usual, DHCS-approved “graduation” criteria to determine when the Member is ready to disenroll.

obligation_text: The eligibility criteria for adults, which include a detailed definition of experiencing homelessness, must be applied from January 2026 and onwards.
source_quote: 7 Eligibility Criteria Applicable from January 2026 and Onwards a. Adults (whether or not they have dependent children/youth living with them) who: (1) Are experiencing homelessness, defined as meeting one or more of the following conditions8: (i) Lacking a fixed, regular, and adequate nighttime residence; (ii) Having a primary residence that is a public or private place not designed for or ordinarily used as a regular sleeping accommodation for human beings, including a car, park, abandoned building, bus or train station, airport, or camping ground; (iii) Living in a supervised publicly or privately operated shelter, designed to provide temporary living arrangements (including hotels and motels paid for by federal, state, or local government programs for low income individuals or by charitable organizations, congregate shelters, and transitional housing); (iv) Exiting an institution into homelessness (regardless of length of stay in the institution); (v) Will imminently lose housing in next 30 days; (vi) Fleeing domestic violence, dating violence, sexual assault, stalking, and other dangerous, traumatic, or life-threatening conditions relating to such violence;

obligation_text: MCPs and Local Educational Agencies (LEAs) are required to enter into memoranda of understanding (MOUs) per the upcoming Medi-Cal Managed Care contract procurement going live in January 2024.
source_quote: DHCS continues to strengthen partnerships with CDE, such as the requirement for MCPs and Local Educational Agencies (LEAs) to enter into memoranda of understanding (MOUs) per the upcoming Medi-Cal Managed Care contract procurement going live in January 2024.

obligation_text: MCPs must refer to the Community Supports Policy Guide (Volume II) for further Transitional Rent policy guidance.
source_quote: Refer to the Community Supports Policy Guide (Volume II) for further Transitional Rent policy guidance.

obligation_text: MCPs may not impose additional eligibility requirements for authorization of ECM.
source_quote: MCPs may not impose additional eligibility requirements for authorization of ECM.

obligation_text: Ensure ECM (Enhanced Care Management) captures the breadth of unsafe, substandard, and insecure living conditions that Members, particularly children and youth, may experience.
source_quote: ensure ECM captures the breadth of unsafe, substandard, and insecure living conditions that Members, particularly children and youth, may experience.

obligation_text: Refer to the Community Supports Policy Guide (Volume II) for further Transitional Rent policy guidance.
source_quote: Refer to the Community Supports Policy Guide (Volume II) for further Transitional Rent policy guidance.

obligation_text: MCPs must establish policies and procedures that allow network providers to refer patients to the MCP for ECM if they suspect eligibility criteria are met.
source_quote: MCPs must establish policies and procedures that allow network providers to refer patients to the MCP for ECM if they suspect eligibility criteria are met

obligation_text: MCPs must track key performance indicators to monitor and improve the volume of provider referrals.
source_quote: track key performance indicators to monitor and improve the volume of provider referrals.

obligation_text: MCPs are expected to utilize data from their regional Continuum of Care Homeless Management Information System (HMIS).
source_quote: MCPs are expected to utilize data from their regional Continuum of Care Homeless Management Information System (HMIS)

obligation_text: MCPs may not impose additional eligibility requirements for authorization of ECM.
source_quote: MCPs may not impose additional eligibility requirements for authorization of ECM.

obligation_text: ECM requires engagement with the Member in the community or at Provider locations.
source_quote: As is true for all ECM Lead Care Managers, ECM requires engagement with the Member in the community or at Provider locations.

obligation_text: For this Population of Focus, the Comprehensive Assessment and Care Management Plan should specifically address housing needs, in addition to any medical and/or social needs identified, and appropriate interventions to address these for the ECM Lead Care Manager to help connect the Member to sources of housing support, including (but not limited to) the pre-approved Community Supports.
source_quote: For this Population of Focus, the Comprehensive Assessment and Care Management Plan should specifically address housing needs, in addition to any medical and/or social needs identified, and appropriate interventions to address these for the ECM Lead Care Manager to help connect the Member to sources of housing support, including (but not limited to) the pre-approved Community Supports.

obligation_text: MCPs should ensure that ECM Providers serving members of this Population of Focus have detailed and up to date information about how to refer Members to housing Community Supports, including eligibility criteria and the operation of lifetime limits, where applicable.
source_quote: MCPs should ensure that ECM Providers serving members of this Population of Focus have detailed and up to date information about how to refer Members to housing Community Supports, including eligibility criteria and the operation of lifetime limits, where applicable.

obligation_text: Per federal requirements, if the Member has LTSS needs, the care plan must be developed by an individual who is trained in person-centered planning.
source_quote: Per federal requirements, if the Member has LTSS needs, the care plan must be developed by an individual who is trained in person-centered planning, using a

obligation_text: A person-centered process should consider and reflect what is important to the Member regarding their preferences for the delivery of LTSS (for example, specific treatment goals, services or functional needs the Member prefers to prioritize).
source_quote: 17 person-centered process; 14 should consider and reflect what is important to the Member regarding their preferences for the delivery of LTSS (for example, specific treatment goals, services or functional needs the Member prefers to prioritize).

obligation_text: ECM should include addressing barriers to housing stability by connecting Members and their families to housing, health and social support resources for this Population of Focus.
source_quote: For this Population of Focus, ECM should include addressing barriers to housing stability by connecting Members and their families to housing, health and social support resources.

obligation_text: ECM for this Population of Focus should include facilitating access to housing-related Community Supports to identify housing and preparing individuals to secure and/or maintain stable housing, including housing that meets the unique needs of pregnant and postpartum individuals and families.
source_quote: » Facilitating access to housing-related Community Supports to identify housing and preparing individuals to secure and/or maintain stable housing, including housing that meets the unique needs of pregnant and postpartum individuals and families.

obligation_text: ECM for this Population of Focus should include maintaining regular contact with Members to ensure there are not gaps in the activities designed to address an individual’s health and social service needs, and swiftly addressing any gaps to ensure progress toward regaining health and function.
source_quote: » Maintaining regular contact with Members to ensure there are not gaps in the activities designed to address an individual’s health and social service needs, and swiftly addressing any gaps to ensure progress toward regaining health and function.

obligation_text: ECM for this Population of Focus should include coordinating and collaborating with various health and social services providers, including Regional Centers and county First 5s, including sharing data (as appropriate) to facilitate better-coordinated whole-person care.
source_quote: » Coordinating and collaborating with various health and social services providers, including Regional Centers and county First 5s,15 including sharing data (as appropriate) to facilitate better-coordinated whole-person care.

obligation_text: ECM for this Population of Focus should include supporting Member treatment adherence, including scheduling appointments, appointment reminders, coordinating transportation, ensuring connection to public benefits, identifying barriers to adherence and accompanying Members to appointments, as needed.
source_quote: » Supporting Member treatment adherence, including scheduling appointments, appointment reminders, coordinating transportation, ensuring connection to public benefits, identifying barriers to adherence and accompanying Members to appointments, as needed.

obligation_text: ECM for this Population of Focus should include utilizing best practices such as Housing First, Harm Reduction, Progressive Engagement, Motivational Interviewing, and Trauma Informed Care.
source_quote: » Utilizing best practices such as Housing First, Harm Reduction, Progressive Engagement, Motivational Interviewing, and Trauma Informed Care.

obligation_text: When the MCP authorizes a Member for Transitional Rent, it must also authorize the Member for ECM.
source_quote: When the MCP authorizes a Member for Transitional Rent, it must also authorize the Member for ECM.

obligation_text: The MCP is required to ensure that the ECM Provider conducts weekly in-person outreach visits to the Member.
source_quote: The MCP is required to ensure that the ECM Provider conducts weekly in-person outreach visits to the Member.

obligation_text: MCPs must contract with ECM Providers specializing in each of the specific Populations of Focus, who have an existing footprint in the communities they serve.
source_quote: MCPs must contract with ECM Providers specializing in each of the specific Populations of Focus, who have an existing footprint in the communities they serve.

obligation_text: MCPs must not impose additional eligibility requirements for authorization of ECM for the Individuals At Risk for Avoidable Hospital or ED Utilization Population of Focus.
source_quote: MCPs may not impose additional eligibility requirements for authorization of ECM.

obligation_text: MCPs may not impose additional eligibility requirements for authorization of ECM.
source_quote: MCPs may not impose additional eligibility requirements for authorization of ECM.
